core_rule: After negation, partitive and indefinite articles usually become de/d' except with etre.
main_traps: Keeping du/de la/des after negation; forgetting apostrophe before vowel
anchor_examples: Je bois du cafe. -> Je ne bois pas de cafe.; Il y a des pommes. -> Il n'y a pas de pommes.

core_rule: Use imparfait for background, habits, ongoing states; use passe compose for completed events.
main_traps: Using passe compose for background; mixing aspect; wrong auxiliary inside passe compose
anchor_examples: Quand j'etais petit, j'habitais a Lyon.; Hier, j'ai perdu mes cles.
